title: Encore Application Configuration
description: Schema for the encore.app configuration file used by the Encore framework.

id.description: The unique application identifier used for deployment.

global_cors.description: Global CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) policy configuration.

allow_headers.description: Additional headers that clients are allowed to send. Encore automatically includes headers used in request/response types.

expose_headers.description: Additional headers exposed to browser scripts beyond the CORS-safelisted response headers.

allow_origins_without_credentials.description: Allowed origins for requests that do not include credentials (cookies, HTTP authentication, client-side TLS certificates). Defaults to ["*"] when not specified.

allow_origins_with_credentials.description: Allowed origins for requests that include credentials. Supports wildcard subdomains (e.g. "https://*.example.com"). No default — must be explicitly configured.

bundle_source.description: Whether to include source code in the Docker image.

base.description: Base Docker image. Defaults to "scratch" for Go applications and "node:slim" for TypeScript applications.

workdir.description: Working directory inside the Docker container. Defaults to "/workspace" for bundled source or "/" otherwise.
